ids.notes: name shared with idn 420 (name_owner false) - repeated current shared value. Cut-in kept: matches the community cadence of the Bright-style order 米诺夫斯基粒子、战斗浓度散布！
Name exactly 5 cells so no room for ！. Shares 不许死 with the cut-in.

ids.cutin_zh: 蜜安……！爸爸一定会回来的！
ids.notes: ミアン = his daughter Mian Fahlen; repo-established 蜜安 (data/zh/characters.json cid 202/203 蜜安·法琳). Added 的 for a natural fatherly promise.

barks.zh: 擦伤一两处而已！别管！前进！
宝贵战力、怎能轻易交出！

notes: Brad Fahlen: Zeon 中佐, Musai captain commanding the Brad Squadron (布拉德战队, repo-established in _STG02) in the Monoeye Gundams original story; team-first veteran officer who dies covering his crew's retreat - voice kept as a warm but firm fleet commander. Barks 0x18208/0x1828C/0x18474 kept unchanged (already natural; their measured encodings exactly fit budgets that the brief cost rule would slightly exceed). All new lines fit budgets under the brief cost rule; details not owned (char_140/26/16).
